email_subject: Application for Service Support at Ellio
email_body:
Dear Jochen Knevels,

I am writing to apply for the Service Support position at Ellio, as advertised via iEd. With a background in digital marketing, technical SEO, and web development, I bring strong analytical and problem-solving skills, as well as a genuine interest in e-bikes and speed pedelecs. I am structured, customer-focused, and comfortable managing multiple cases simultaneously.

In my current role at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, content creation, and WordPress site management, which has honed my ability to organize information, prioritize tasks, and communicate clearly. I also maintain my own project, mirook.com, where I apply technical audits and structured data to improve search visibility.

I am eager to combine my technical affinity with my passion for cycling in a role where I can directly support dealers and contribute to Ellio's growth. I speak fluent Dutch (A2, currently improving) and English.

I would love to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Jochen Knevels,

I am excited to apply for the Service Support position at Ellio, a company whose innovative speed pedelecs and focus on dealer experience truly resonate with me. As a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation and a strong interest in cycling, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites. This requires meticulous attention to detail, structured workflow, and clear communication—skills directly transferable to supporting dealers with technical issues, warranty requests, and order inquiries. I am comfortable using various software tools and am quick to learn new systems.

My own project, mirook.com, demonstrates my ability to independently manage a website, implement structured data, and conduct technical audits. This analytical mindset will help me logically assess technical problems and ensure accurate case follow-up.

I am customer-oriented, solution-driven, and thrive in collaborative environments. I speak fluent Dutch (A2, actively improving) and English. I am eager to bring my technical affinity, organizational skills, and passion for e-mobility to Ellio.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can support your dealers and contribute to your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Technical affinity with e-bikes and speed pedelecs (personal interest)
Structured and detail-oriented: manages multiple client websites and projects simultaneously
Strong communication skills: clear, professional, and customer-focused
Proficient with computer programs: WordPress, Office, spreadsheets, analytics tools
Quick learner: adapts to new tools and platforms easily
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer-oriented and structured: manages multiple cases, prioritizes tasks, and ensures accurate follow-up
- Technical affinity with e-bikes and speed pedelecs (personal interest)
- Proficient with computer programs: WordPress, Elementor, Office, spreadsheets, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Clear and professional communication: Dutch (A2, in progress), English (professional), Turkish (native)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
